summary: Backend: 28/28 pytest tests passing — public, auth, worker/client/admin flows, role enforcement. Frontend: Landing/Login/Worker/Client/Admin dashboards load correctly with cookie auth; waitlist modal submits; client can create task via UI; admin Users tab shows role dropdowns. Roadmap renders (uses 'Now/Next/Soon/Vision' labels instead of 'Phase 1..4' — not a bug, just labelling).
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/tasks/{task_id} requires auth — that's fine but means landing UI can't fetch a single task without login (acceptable for MVP).

POST /api/tasks/{task_id}/apply: when task is already assigned, endpoint silently appends to applicants and returns ok — caller has no signal that they were not assigned. Consider returning {assigned: bool}.

review_submission lets ANY client (not just task owner) approve if they happen to know submission_id — current check is sub.client_id == user.user_id which is correct for owner; OK but worth a comment.
Auto-seed on startup runs every boot guarded by tasks count; safe but if collections get partially wiped it won't re-seed users. Idempotent for MVP.

CORS_ORIGINS defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True — browsers will reject credentialed CORS with wildcard. Currently cookies still flow because frontend & backend share the same emergentagent.com origin via ingress, but worth pinning to a real origin in prod.
server.py is ~700 lines — close to the recommended split threshold; future refactor could separate routers (auth/tasks/submissions/admin).
test_credentials: Seeded demo users user_demo_admin / user_demo_client1 / user_demo_worker1 — sessions created via direct MongoDB insert (see /app/auth_testing.md). Three live FE tokens were inserted during testing (fe_test_*). Test data prefixed with TEST_ was cleaned up via teardown.
seed_data_creation: None additional — startup auto-seed already provides 5 users, 8 tasks, 1 submission, 3 waitlist. Test suite creates+cleans TEST_-prefixed tasks/submissions/waitlist/feedback rows.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is regression-safe (cleans TEST_ data). For FE auth testing, insert a session into user_sessions collection then set cookie session_token on domain planb-work.preview.emergentagent.com (httpOnly secure sameSite=None). /dashboard auto-redirects by role. Roadmap labels are 'Now (MVP)/Next (Q2)/Soon (Q3)/Vision' (do not search for 'Phase 1..4').
rca of the issue: No bugs detected. App and integration verified working end-to-end.
